mapper.select: /* com.matjzing.mapper.SwaggerUserMapper.selectSwaggerUserPage */ SELECT MEMBER_SEQ /*회원_시퀀스*/ , ID /*ID*/ , PASSWORD /*비밀번호*/ , NAME /*이름*/ , USE_YN /*사용_여부*/ , REGISTER_SEQ /*등록자_시퀀스*/ , REGISTER_IP /*등록자_아이피*/ , REGISTRATION_DT /*등록_일시*/ , UPDATER_SEQ /*수정자_시퀀스*/ , UPDATER_IP /*수정자_아이피*/ , UPDATE_DT /*수정_일시*/ FROM SWAGGER_MEMBER

/* com.matjzing.mapper.SwaggerUserMapper.selectSwaggerUser */ SELECT MEMBER_SEQ /*회원_시퀀스*/ , ID /*ID*/ , PASSWORD /*비밀번호*/ , NAME /*이름*/ , USE_YN /*사용_여부*/ , REGISTER_SEQ /*등록자_시퀀스*/ , REGISTER_IP /*등록자_아이피*/ , REGISTRATION_DT /*등록_일시*/ , UPDATER_SEQ /*수정자_시퀀스*/ , UPDATER_IP /*수정자_아이피*/ , UPDATE_DT /*수정_일시*/ FROM SWAGGER_MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_SEQ = #{memberSeq}
